privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating a PDF absence report for OpenSIS using credentials (admin / Admin@123). The system contains three students injected via setup script: Cameron Frye and Ferris Bueller are marked absent, and Hermione Granger is marked present. All data is synthetic, created by directly inserting records into the MySQL database. The completed report must be saved as 'absence_report.pdf' to /home/ga/Documents/.
